title: Ericoides periplociflorum

intro: Ericoides periplociflorum, also known as the Chinese dragon flower, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is traditionally used in medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The bioactive constituents of Ericoides periplociflorum include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
